name: swarmx-monorepo
description: SwarmX multi-agent orchestration — Electron + Node.js edition

scripts.ci: pnpm run ci:node && pnpm run ci:inspect
scripts.ci:node: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm -r build
scripts.eval:inspect: uv run --locked --group inspect inspect eval evals/inspect/tasks.py@swarmx_smoke --model none
scripts.test:inspect: uv run --locked --group inspect python -m unittest discover -s evals/inspect -p '*_test.py' && pnpm eval:inspect
